name: WILLIAMS COMPANIES, INC.
business: Williams provides natural gas gathering, processing, transmission, storage, NGL fractionation, transportation, storage, and marketing services, as well as crude oil transportation and production handling. The company serves approximately 800 customers across 11 supply areas and operates over 32,000 miles of pipelines. Its interstate pipelines transport natural gas for local distribution companies, utilities, industrial users, and power generators.

exposures.sentence: Williams is investing in construction projects to support the power demands created by new data center and industrial development in power grid-constrained markets, including agreements with a large, investment-grade company to provide onsite natural gas and power generation infrastructure.

In October 2025, Williams closed on various agreements with the same counterparty to acquire a 10 percent equity-method investment in Louisiana LNG LLC (Louisiana LNG), which is developing a fully permitted LNG export facility, and an 80 percent interest in Driftwood Pipeline LLC (Driftwood Pipeline), which is constructing a fully permitted greenfield pipeline, Line 200, connecting to multiple other pipelines, including Transco and Louisiana Energy Gateway, to supply the LNG facility.

In March 2025, Williams purchased a minority interest in Cogentrix Co-Investment Fund, LP (Cogentrix) which is accounted for as an equity-method investment within the Gas & NGL Marketing Services segment. Cogentrix owns interests in 11 natural gas power plants.

A breach of information technology infrastructure, including a breach caused by a cybersecurity attack on Williams, Transco, or NWP, or the third parties with whom they are interconnected, may interfere with the safe operation of assets, result in the disclosure of personal or proprietary information, and cause reputational harm.
Transco s principal business is the interstate transportation of natural gas, which is regulated by the FERC.

catalysts.event: Transco placed pipeline expansion projects in service during 2025
catalysts.sentence: During 2025, Transco placed the following pipeline expansion projects in service: Commonwealth Energy Connector 0.1 MMdth/d, Alabama Georgia Connector 0.1 MMdth/d, Texas to Louisiana Energy Pathway 0.4 MMdth/d, Southeast Energy Connector 0.2 MMdth/d.

catalysts.event: Whale expansion project in service in January 2025
catalysts.sentence: Includes the Whale expansion project that went into service in January 2025.

catalysts.event: MountainWest Overthrust Westbound Compression expansion project in service during 2025
catalysts.sentence: During 2025, MountainWest placed the Overthrust Westbound Compression expansion project into service increasing firm transportation capacity by approximately 0.3 MMdth/d to its pipeline.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of equity-method investment in Louisiana LNG and Driftwood Pipeline closed in October 2025
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, Williams closed on various agreements with the same counterparty to acquire a 10 percent equity-method investment in Louisiana LNG LLC (Louisiana LNG), which is developing a fully permitted LNG export facility, and an 80 percent interest in Driftwood Pipeline LLC (Driftwood Pipeline), which is constructing a fully permitted greenfield pipeline, Line 200, connecting to multiple other pipelines, including Transco and Louisiana Energy Gateway, to supply the LNG facility.

catalysts.event: Louisiana LNG and Driftwood Pipeline expected in-service by 2029
catalysts.sentence: These projects are expected to be placed into service by 2029.

catalysts.event: Power innovation projects expected in-service during 2026-2028
catalysts.sentence: Williams plans to place the projects into service during 2026 through 2028, assuming timely receipt of permits.

catalysts.event: FERC approval of Transco rate settlement effective March 1, 2026
catalysts.sentence: On December 30, 2025, the FERC approved the agreement, which will become effective on March 1, 2026.

catalysts.event: Sale of Haynesville properties closed on January 30, 2026
catalysts.sentence: On January 30, 2026, Williams closed on the sale of its interests in the region for consideration of $398 million with additional contingent consideration to possibly be received through 2029.
